placeholder.name: Name
placeholder.command: e.g. send, query, toScript (optional, can be empty)
placeholder.message: Optional JSON message (leave empty to use msg.payload)

info.adapterNote: If no instance is selected, msg.instance will be used
info.messageNote: If empty, msg.payload will be used as the message content
info.responseModeDescription: Node will wait for adapter response and send it as output message. Useful for queries and commands that return data.
info.fireAndForgetDescription: Node will send the command and not wait for response. No output will be generated.

help.title: Send Commands to ioBroker Adapter Instances
help.description: Send commands and messages to ioBroker adapter instances via WebSocket using the sendTo functionality for service integration and automation.
help.targetInstanceDescription: Select from dropdown. If empty, msg.instance is used.
help.commandDescription: Optional command parameter. Some instances require this, others don't.
help.staticMessageDescription: Optional JSON message to send. If empty, msg.payload is used.
help.waitForResponseDescription: Enable to receive instance response as output message.
help.responseTimeoutDescription: Maximum time to wait for response (1-60 seconds).
help.instanceSelectionDescription: The dropdown shows all available adapter instances with their current status:
instanceStatusList: 🟢 Running: Instance is currently active and ready to receive commands
🔴 Stopped: Instance is installed but not currently running
help.inputMessageDescription: Message properties that can override node configuration:
inputMessageList: msg.message - Message content (overrides node setting and msg.payload)
msg.payload - Used as message if no static message configured
msg.timeout - Response timeout in milliseconds (overrides node setting)
